title: Opening for Production Engineer at Jain Irrigation

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Jain Irrigation
jsonLd.description:
Jain Irrigation has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Jain Irrigation:
Jain Irrigation is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jain Irrigation!
